rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH MILES VS. MARC SHISHIDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Pasquale Caiazza And The Strunzo Development Corporation Of California'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 13, 2015, Line 5: Defendants Pasquale Caiazza And The Strunzo Development Corporation Of California'S Demurrer To Complaint: SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend on CCP 430.10(f) grounds for Plaintiff to allege facts regarding each element of conversion as to each defendant and how each defendant prevented Plaintiff from removing his property upon demand (paragraphs 14 and 15 of complaint). Demurrer is overruled as to the litigation privilege argument and Statute of Limitations argument. (501/CFH)
